title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Retail Sales (Jun): +0.2% MoM vs +0.3% est — softer than expected; ex-gas +0.7% resilient.
ETH outperforming: BlackRock ETHA +$96M this week; ETH +11% (7d) vs BTC flat near $64,700.
Japan reclassifies crypto as "financial assets," reduces taxes — fresh institutional demand catalyst.
Clarity Act House hearing Jul 17, Senate vote Jul 20 — key legislative window this week.
July 29 FOMC hike odds ~40%; oil $80+ (US-Iran strikes), gold steady $4,038, DXY 100.6.
